user.title: Cloudflare API token
user.description: Enter a Cloudflare API token with permission to read and edit Account Rule Lists.

account.title: Cloudflare account
account.description: Select the account that owns the Rule List you want to keep in sync.

rule_list.title: Rule List
rule_list.description: Select the IP Rule List that should always contain your current public IP.

entity.title: Source entity
entity.description: Select the Home Assistant entity whose state holds your public IP address.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Cloudflare
reauth_confirm.description: The stored API token is no longer valid. Enter a new token to continue.

error.invalid_auth: The API token was rejected or lacks the required permissions.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Cloudflare. Check your network and try again.
error.rate_limit: Cloudflare rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Rule List is already configured.
abort.no_accounts: The token cannot access any Cloudflare accounts.
abort.no_rule_lists: No IP Rule Lists were found in this account.
abort.no_ip_entities: No Home Assistant entity currently holds an IP address.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach Cloudflare. Check your network and try again.
abort.invalid_auth: The API token was rejected or lacks the required permissions.
abort.rate_limit: Cloudflare rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.

data_description.max_retries: How many times to retry a failed synchronization before giving up.
data_description.reconcile_interval: How often to re-check Cloudflare against the source entity as a safety net.

rule_list_missing.title: Cloudflare Rule List no longer exists
rule_list_missing.description: The Rule List "{list_name}" could not be found in your Cloudflare account anymore. It may have been deleted, or the API token lost access to it. Remove and reconfigure this integration, pointing it at an existing Rule List, to resume syncing.

force_sync.name: Force sync
force_sync.description: Immediately reconciles the Cloudflare Rule List with the source IP entity, without waiting for the next scheduled check.

config_entry_id.name: Cloudflare IP Sync entry
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Cloudflare IP Sync instance to sync.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reloads a Cloudflare IP Sync config entry, equivalent to reloading it from Settings > Devices & Services.

config_entry_id.name: Cloudflare IP Sync entry
config_entry_id.description: Which configured Cloudflare IP Sync instance to reload.
